news_items.title: The Morning After: The new iPad Air M4 is Apple's best overall tablet
news_items.summary: Apple has released the new iPad Air M4, which is considered the company's best overall tablet. It's been less than two years since the company released the M2-powered iPad Air and we're already on our third iPad Air iteration, one with the M4 inside.

news_items.title: Qualcomm introduces Arduino Ventuno Q single-board computer
news_items.summary: Qualcomm has introduced a new single-board computer, Arduino Ventuno Q, focusing on AI and robotics applications.

news_items.title: Dell revamps XPS 14 laptop with enhanced power
news_items.summary: Dell has revamped its XPS 14 laptop, which is now more powerful than ever with the latest hardware upgrades.

news_items.title: H2 2025 Mobility Tech VC Trends report highlights significant investments
news_items.summary: The H2 2025 Mobility Tech VC Trends report highlights significant investments in mobility technology across various sectors.

news_items.title: Meta lets in rivals, age-checking tech matures
news_items.summary: Meta has implemented changes allowing competitors access while advancing age-checking technology maturity.

news_items.title: Escape raises $18 million to automate pentesting with AI agents
news_items.summary: Offensive cybersecurity startup Escape has raised $18 million in Series A funding to automate penetration testing using AI agents, bringing total funding to over $23 million.

news_items.title: Smartmatic seeks dismissal of money laundering indictment
news_items.summary: Smartmatic is seeking to dismiss a money laundering indictment, attributing the case to President Trump's campaign of retribution following his 2020 election loss.

news_items.title: NAPLAN tests disrupted by tech issue on first day
news_items.summary: NAPLAN tests experienced technical disruptions on the first day, highlighting ongoing challenges in educational technology implementation.

news_items.title: Apple's new emoji has controversial past but fans love it anyway
news_items.summary: Apple has launched new emojis with the iOS 26.4 update, including some with controversial histories that fans still embrace.

news_items.title: Kai emerges from stealth with $125M funding for AI platform
news_items.summary: Kai emerged from stealth mode with $125 million in funding for an AI-powered platform that bridges IT and OT cybersecurity.
